project.name: NarrativeLoom
project.description: Python LangGraph-based AI narrative generation pipeline with specialized agents, narrative engines, and chronicle production for WorldOS V6.

nodes.name: Narrative Pipeline
nodes.summary: LangGraph-based multi-phase pipeline that generates AI narratives through agent collaboration.

nodes.name: Specialized AI Agents
nodes.summary: Collection of LLM-powered agents (director, critic, historian, wordsmith, etc.) each handling a specific narrative task.

nodes.name: Narrative Engines
nodes.summary: Analysis and generation engines for arcs, attractors, entropy, style, singularity, and event normalization.

nodes.name: Chronicle Production
nodes.summary: End-to-end chronicle assembly, editing, and delivery pipeline from raw simulation events to polished narrative.

layers.name: Entrypoint & Configuration
layers.description: FastAPI entry point, Dockerfile, and dependency manifests.

layers.name: LangGraph Narrative Pipeline
layers.description: State machine, graph builder, state models, and schemas defining the narrative generation workflow.

layers.name: Specialized AI Agents
layers.description: LLM-powered agents (16) handling directing, editing, criticism, history, myth, news, art, audio, VFX, and artifact generation.

layers.name: Narrative Engines
layers.description: Analysis engines for arcs, attractors, entropy, event normalization, phase management, singularity, and style.

layers.name: Core Infrastructure
layers.description: Agent wrapper, Celery app, Centrifugo client, metrics, logging, exceptions, and LangFuse setup.

layers.name: API Routers
layers.description: FastAPI route handlers for actors, chronicle, scribe, and system operations.

layers.name: Background Tasks
layers.description: Celery task definitions for async chronicle generation.

layers.name: Knowledge & Configuration Data
layers.description: Structured knowledge data — era definitions, agent routing config, and power manifestos.

layers.name: Documentation & Tests
layers.description: README, test scripts, and benchmark utilities.

tour.title: Service Overview
tour.description: Start from the FastAPI entry point and README to understand NarrativeLoom purpose and architecture.

tour.title: LangGraph Narrative Pipeline
tour.description: Explore the core narrative state machine and graph builder that orchestrate AI narrative generation.

tour.title: Director & Editorial Agents
tour.description: See how the Director and Chief Editor coordinate narrative flow and quality control.

tour.title: Narrative Creation Agents
tour.description: Wordsmith, Historian, News Anchor, and other agents that produce narrative content.

tour.title: Narrative Analysis Engines
tour.description: Analysis engines for style, arcs, attractors, entropy, and phase management.

tour.title: API & Background Tasks
tour.description: REST endpoints and Celery tasks that expose and execute narrative generation.

tour.title: Knowledge & Configuration
tour.description: Knowledge data, era definitions, and agent routing configuration for world-building.
